original_image_tags: A slightly yellowed page from a file, likely a newspaper clipping mounted or clipped and attached. The page contains a newspaper article from the Omaha World-Herald, handwritten notations, and stamped filing information. There are two punch holes at the top center.

elements.description: A newspaper clipping from the Omaha World-Herald, Omaha, Nebraska, Sunrise Edition, dated 11-7-57. Headline: 'No Saucers' Trace Found'. Sub-headlines: 'A.F. Checks Schmidt; Kearney Amused' and 'Newsmen Busy'. Text discusses an Air Force investigation into a flying saucer story involving a man named Schmidt in Kearney, Nebraska.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific headline and sub-headline text from the newspaper clipping that Description A does not mention or quote, and Description A describes a generic article while B provides specific, contradictory visual details about the clipping's content.
